title: CommandCenterUI: quote/reply and attention inbox for chat
description: Operator request hcom #17290: make CommandCenterUI chat support quoting/replying to messages and provide an easy way to see and answer questions/messages needing operator attention. Use hcom reply_to as the durable reply primitive, add message-level reply/quote affordances, render quoted context clearly, and add an attention inbox for intent=request, direct mentions of command-center/bigboss/operator aliases, and messages marked as needing reply. The inbox should jump to the source message and prefill/attach reply context without hiding the original hcom record.
acceptance_criteria: Each chat message has an ergonomic quote/reply affordance that sends hcom reply_to with visible quoted context in the composer and feed
Attention inbox lists open operator-action messages, including hcom intent=request and direct operator mentions, with jump-to-message and reply actions
Original message text remains the source of record; quotes are presentation/context and cannot silently alter hcom history
Feature works with existing polling and does not add an unsafe write endpoint beyond the existing guarded chat send path
